    All Packages

    Package Summary
    Package
    Description
    applicationMain
    The applicationMain package is used to hold the mainline classes for the application.
    database
     
    entityClasses
    Domain entities for the discussion system, including posts, replies, and user-related models.
    guiAddRemoveRoles
     
    guiAdminHome
     
    guiDiscussion
    MVC package for the student discussion board user interface.
    guiEmailLogin
    MVC package for email-based login.
    guiEmailRegister
    MVC package for email-based registration.
    guiFirstAdmin
     
    guiGradebook
     
    guiInviteUsers
    MVC package for invitation management used by account workflows.
    guiMultipleRoleDispatch
    MVC package for selecting an active role when a user has multiple roles.
    guiNewAccount
    MVC package for first-time account creation flows.
    guiStaffHome
     
    guiStudentHome
    MVC package for the student home screen.
    guiTools
    Shared GUI helper utilities for role dispatch and common view concerns.
    guiUserLogin
    MVC package for username/password login and invitation entry.
    guiUserUpdate
    MVC package for updating student account profile information.
